_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.IntelligentOCR.Activities Digitize Document (UiPath Document OCR engine) faults with System.AggregateException whose inner message is 'Server response: Invalid API key specified Error:UiPathOCRInvalidApiKey' (from PageDigitizer.ApplyOcr) because the UiPath Document OCR API key is invalid. Signature captured verbatim from a live uip rpa run; workflow/process names neutralized, no real key/document. The agent must read the inner server response as the cause (invalid OCR ApiKey), not stop at the AggregateException wrapper, and not blame the document, a missing file, the Digitizer PDF-component license, or tenant-not-enabled. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the 'Server response: Invalid API key specified Error:UiPathOCRInvalidApiKey' signature (System.AggregateException) from the Info / Error log.
